\subsection{The two tracks live: 2026 as it speaks}\label{sec:twotracklive}
The pre-registered A-vs-B study of Appendix~D, running on the real tournament: after each match the observed shot performance ($\lambda_{\mathrm{obs}}$, Appendix~D.2) updates the learning track's ratings (k=50, locked), while the frozen track re-conditions on results alone. 3 match(es) processed so far.
